title: sarcomelicope simplicifolia subsp. simplicifolia
intro: Sarcomelicope simplicifolia subsp. simplicifolia, also known as the Yellow Midge, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to the tropical forests of Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sarcomelicope simplicifolia subsp. simplicifolia include its use in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
